first_run.rationale: The model's evaluation is consistent across both versions. The score is identical (3/10), and the core reasoning remains unchanged: the candidate lacks the mandatory C++, database, and domain-specific experience for the role. The model correctly did not allow the prestige of the new employer names (Google, Meta, Amazon) to override this fundamental skills mismatch. The minor differences in wording are well within the range of normal run-to-run variation.
